Jamie Metcalfe Campbell Bower (born 22 November 1988) is an English actor, model and singer. He made his feature film debut in 2007 with a supporting role in Tim Burton's Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber of Fleet Street, before going on to feature in The Twilight Saga (2009–2012) and as the young Gellert Grindelwald in Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows – Part 1 (2010) and Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald (2018). Bower was part of the main cast of the fantasy series Camelot (2011, Starz) and Will (2017, TNT), both of which only ran for a single season each.

From 2015 to 2020, he served as the frontman of London-based band Counterfeit. In 2020, he began releasing music as a solo artist. In 2022, Bower joined the cast of the Netflix science fiction horror series Stranger Things, where he plays Henry Creel/Vecna in the fourth and fifth seasons, a role for which he has garnered wide critical acclaim. On 19 December 2025, he reprised the role onstage in his Broadway debut, a surprise appearance in the final scene of Stranger Things: The First Shadow.

Bower will reportedly appear in the third season of The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power, as well as a starring role in the Screen Gems horror The Haunting in Wicker Park.

Description above from the Wikipedia article Jamie Campbell Bower, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Jamie Campbell Bower

data.biography:
James Metcalfe Campbell Bower, né le 22 novembre 1988 à Londres en Angleterre, est un acteur, chanteur et mannequin britannique.

Il est le fils de Anne Elizabeth (née Roseberry), une manager de musique, et de David Bower qui travaille pour la Gibson Guitar Corporation. Son 4e grand-père maternel était Sir John Campbell, de Airds, lieutenant-gouverneur de Saint-Vincent-et-les-Grenadines. Il a un frère Sam Bower, un guitariste.

Il a assisté à l'école Bedales, une co-éducation école indépendante dans le Hampshire et est un ancien membre du National Youth Music Theatre et le National Théâtre de la jeunesse.

Il s'est fait connaître en 2007 par son rôle d'Anthony dans Sweeney Todd : Le Diabolique Barbier de Fleet Street de Tim Burton avant de figurer plus tard au casting de deux séries de films à succès : Twilight (dans le rôle de Caius) et Harry Potter dans le rôle du jeune Gellert Grindelwald. En 2022, il prend le rôle de Vecna comme principal antagoniste de la quatrième saison de la série télévisée Stranger Things.
英国演员，因在蒂姆·伯顿（Tim Burton）的《斯威尼·托德：舰队街的恶魔理发师》中饰演安东尼·霍普（Anthony Hope）而闻名，他在《暮光之城：新月》中扮演凯斯（Caius）的角色，以及在Starz原创剧集《卡米洛特》（Camelot）中扮演亚瑟王的角色。他还在两部曲《哈利·波特与死亡圣器》中饰演年轻的盖勒特·格林德沃，并将在即将上映的《凡人乐器》（系列）电影改编中扮演杰斯·韦兰。

Jamie Metcalfe Campbell Bower ist ein englischer Schauspieler, Model und Sänger. Sein Spielfilmdebüt gab er 2007 in einer Nebenrolle in Tim Burtons „Sweeney Todd – Der teuflische Barbier aus der Fleet Street“. Anschließend wirkte er in der „Twilight“-Saga (2009–2012) mit und verkörperte den jungen Gellert Grindelwald in „Harry Potter und die Heiligtümer des Todes – Teil 1“ (2010) und „Phantastische Tierwesen: Grindelwalds Verbrechen“ (2018). Bower gehörte zur Hauptbesetzung der Fantasy-Serien „Camelot“ (2011, Starz) und „Will“ (2017, TNT), die jeweils nur eine Staffel lang liefen.

Von 2015 bis 2020 war er Frontmann der Londoner Band Counterfeit. Seit 2020 veröffentlicht er Musik als Solokünstler. 2022 stieß Bower zur Besetzung der Netflix-Science-Fiction-Horrorserie „Stranger Things“ hinzu, wo er in der vierten und fünften Staffel Henry Creel/Vecna ​​verkörperte.

Sara Berner (born Lillian Ann Herdan; January 12, 1912 – December 19, 1969) was an American actress. Known for her expertise in dialect and characterization, she began her career as a performer in vaudeville before becoming a voice actress for radio and animated shorts. She starred in her own radio show on NBC, Sara's Private Caper, and was best known as telephone operator Mabel Flapsaddle on The Jack Benny Program.

Jason Deneen Beghè (born March 12, 1960) is an American film and television actor and critic of Scientology. He is best known for his starring role as sergeant Hank Voight on the NBC TV series Chicago P.D. and for starring in the 1988 George A. Romero film Monkey Shines. He's also known for playing Demi Moore's love interest in G.I. Jane, appearing as a police officer in the film Thelma & Louise, starring opposite Moira Kelly on the series To Have & to Hold, and having recurring roles on Picket Fences, Melrose Place, Chicago Hope, American Dreams, Cane, and Californication.

He began taking Scientology courses in 1994, and later appeared in a Church of Scientology advertising campaign and in promotional videos. According to Beghe, Church of Scientology head David Miscavige referred to him as "the poster boy for Scientology". Beghe left Scientology in 2007 and began publicly speaking out about his experiences within the church in April 2008. An on camera interview with Beghe about his experiences in Scientology conducted by Xenu TV founder and journalist Mark Bunker was published to the video site YouTube and later Vimeo. Marina Hyde of The Guardian newspaper called Beghe a Scientology celebrity whistleblower for his actions.

As a young man he attended the Collegiate School in New York City, where he became best friends with John F. Kennedy, Jr. and David Duchovny.
data.name: Jason Beghe

data.biography:
Jason Deneen Beghè (geboren am 12. März 1960) ist ein amerikanischer Film- und Fernsehschauspieler und Kritiker von Scientology. Als junger Mann besuchte er die Collegiate School in New York City, wo er mit John F. Kennedy, Jr. und David Duchovny befreundet war.

Beghe spielte 1988 die Hauptrolle in dem George A. Romero-Film Monkey Shines: An Experiment In Fear (Ein Experiment in Angst), in dem er einen Tetraplegiker spielte, eine Rolle, die positiv aufgenommen wurde. Er spielte einen Polizeibeamten in dem Film Thelma & Louise und Demi Moores Liebesinteresse in G.I. Jane. Beghe spielte die Hauptrolle an der Seite von Moira Kelly in der Fernsehserie To Have & to Hold und hatte wiederkehrende Rollen in Picket Fences, Melrose Place, Chicago Hope, American Dreams und Cane sowie Rollen in zahlreichen anderen Fernsehsendungen.

Er hat eine Hauptrolle in der seit langem laufenden Polizeiserie Chicago P.D.

Er begann 1994, Scientology-Kurse zu besuchen, und trat später in einer Werbekampagne der Scientology-Kirche und in Werbevideos auf. Laut Beghe bezeichnete ihn der Leiter der Scientology-Kirche, David Miscavige, als "das Aushängeschild der Scientology". Beghe verließ Scientology im Jahr 2007 und begann im April 2008, öffentlich über seine Erfahrungen innerhalb der Kirche zu sprechen. Ein von Xenu TV-Gründer und Journalist Mark Bunker geführtes Kamera-Interview mit Beghe über seine Erfahrungen in Scientology wurde auf der Video-Website YouTube und später auf Vimeo veröffentlicht. Marina Hyde von der Zeitung The Guardian bezeichnete Beghe aufgrund seiner Aktionen als prominenten Scientology-Whistleblower.

data.biography: Ashleigh Cummings (born 11 November 1992) is an Australian actress. She is known for her roles in the films Tomorrow, When the War Began (2010), Puberty Blues (2012), Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries (2012–2015), Hounds of Love (2016), NOS4A2 (2019), and Citadel (2022–present). Cummings was born in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, to Australian parents. She moved to Australia with her family when she was 12 years old. She began her acting career in the early 2000s, appearing in a number of television commercials and short films. In 2007, she made her feature film debut in Razzle Dazzle. Cummings' breakthrough role came in 2010, when she starred in the film Tomorrow, When the War Began. The film was a critical and commercial success, and Cummings was nominated for Best Young Actor at the 2010 Australian Film Institute Awards. Since then, Cummings has starred in a number of films and television series, including Puberty Blues, Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries, Hounds of Love, NOS4A2, and Citadel. She is known for her versatility and her ability to bring complex characters to life. Cummings has won numerous awards for her work, including the Australian Film Institute Award for Best Young Actor (2010), the Logie Award for Most Outstanding New Talent (2013), and the AACTA Award for Best Lead Actress in a Television Drama (2019). Cummings is a talented actress with a bright future ahead of her. She is known for her versatility and her ability to bring complex characters to life.
data.name: Ashleigh Cummings

data.biography:
Ashleigh Cummings (Arabia Saudita, 11 de noviembre de 1992) es una actriz australiana, más conocida por interpretar a Dorothy Williams en Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries.  Ashleigh nació en Arabia Saudí y es hija de padres australianos.

Se graduó en la Screenwise Film & TV School for Actors de Sídney, Australia.  En el 2007 obtuvo un papel secundario en la película Razzle Dazzle: A Journey Into Dance donde interpretó a una bailarina del grupo de la señorita Elizabeth (Jane Hall).

En el 2009 apareció como invitada en la popular y exitosa serie australiana Home and Away donde interpretó a Ali Edmonds.

En el 2010 apareció en la película Mañana, cuando la guerra empiece donde interpretó a Robyn Mathers.

En el 2012 se unió al elenco principal de la serie Miss Fisher's Murder Mysteries donde interpreta a Dorothy "Dot" Williams, la mucama y amiga de la detective Phryne Fisher (Essie Davis) e interés romántico del oficial Hugh Collins (Hugo Johnstone-Burt), hasta ahora.

Ese mismo año, Ashleigh se unió al elenco principal de la miniserie Puberty Blues, donde interpreta a la joven Debbie Vickers,2​3​ también interpretará nuevamente a Robyn Mathers en la película Tomorrow, When the War Began 2.

data.biography: 阿什利·卡明斯（Ashleigh Cummings，1992年11月11日-），澳大利亚女演员。她因在电影《明天》、《战争开始时》（2010 年）、《青春期蓝调》（2012 年）、《费舍尔小姐的谋杀之谜》（2012-2015 年）、《爱的猎犬》（2016 年）、《NOS4A2》（2019 年）和《城堡》（2022 年至今）中的角色而闻名。卡明斯出生于沙特阿拉伯吉达，父母是澳大利亚人。她12岁时随家人移居澳大利亚。她在 2000 年代初开始了她的演艺生涯，出现在许多电视广告和短片中。2007年，她在《Razzle Dazzle》中首次亮相。卡明斯的突破性角色出现在 2010 年，当时她主演了电影《明天，当战争开始时》。这部电影在评论界和商业上都取得了成功，卡明斯在 2010 年澳大利亚电影学院奖上被提名为最佳年轻演员。从那时起，卡明斯出演了多部电影和电视剧，包括《青春期蓝调》、《费舍尔小姐的谋杀之谜》、《爱的猎犬》、《NOS4A2》和《城堡》。她以其多才多艺和将复杂角色栩栩如生的能力而闻名。卡明斯的作品赢得了无数奖项，包括澳大利亚电影学院最佳年轻演员奖（2010 年）、洛吉最杰出新人奖（2013 年）和 AACTA 电视剧最佳女主角奖（2019 年）。卡明斯是一位才华横溢的女演员，拥有光明的未来。她以其多才多艺和将复杂角色栩栩如生的能力而闻名。
data.name: 阿什利·卡明斯

data.biography: 艾什莉·康寧思（Ashleigh Cummings，1992 年 11 月 11 日-），澳大利亞女演員。她因在電影《明天》、《戰爭開始時》（2010 年）、《青春期藍調》（2012 年）、《費捨爾小姐的謀殺之謎》（2012 - 2015 年）、《愛的獵犬》（2016 年）、《NOS4A2》（2019 年）和《城堡》（2022 年至今）中的角色而聞名。康寧思出生於沙烏地阿拉伯吉達，父母是澳大利亞人。她 12 歲時隨家人移居澳大利亞。她在 2000 年代初開始了她的演藝生涯，出現在許多電視廣告和短片中。2007 年，她在《Razzle Dazzle》中首次亮相。康寧思的突破性角色出現在 2010 年，當時她主演了電影《明天，當戰爭開始時》。這部電影在評論界和商業上都取得了成功，康寧思在 2010 年澳大利亞電影學院獎上被提名為最佳年輕演員。從那時起，康寧思出演了多部電影和電視劇，包括《青春期藍調》、《費捨爾小姐的謀殺之謎》、《愛的獵犬》、《NOS4A2》和《城堡》。她以其多才多藝和將複雜角色栩栩如生的能力而聞名。康寧思的作品贏得了無數獎項，包括澳大利亞電影學院最佳年輕演員獎（2010 年）、洛吉最傑出新人獎（2013 年）和 AACTA 電視劇最佳女主角獎（2019 年）。康寧思是一位才華橫溢的女演員，擁有光明的未來。她以其多才多藝和將複雜角色栩栩如生的能力而聞名。
data.name: 艾什莉·康寧思

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Aldo Giuffrè (10 April 1924 – 26 June 2010) was an Italian film actor and comedian who appeared in over 90 films between 1948 and 2001. He was born in Naples.

He is known for his roles in The Four Days of Naples, and as the alcoholic Union Army captain in the Sergio Leone film The Good, the Bad and the Ugly in 1966.

Giuffrè died in Rome in 2010 of peritonitis.

data.biography:
Maximilian Schell (8 December 1930 – 1 February 2014) was a Swiss actor. Born in Austria, his parents were involved in the arts and he grew up surrounded by performance and literature. While he was still a child, his family fled to Switzerland in 1938 when Austria was annexed by Nazi Germany, and they settled in Zürich. After World War II ended, Schell took up acting and directing full-time.

Schell won the Academy Award for Best Actor for playing a lawyer in the legal drama Judgment at Nuremberg (1961). He was Oscar-nominated for playing a character with multiple identities in The Man in the Glass Booth (1975) and for playing a man resisting Nazism in Julia (1977). Fluent in both English and German, Schell earned top billing in a number of Nazi-era themed films. He acted in films such as Topkapi (1964), The Deadly Affair (1967), Counterpoint (1968), Simón Bolívar (1969), The Odessa File (1974), A Bridge Too Far (1977), and Deep Impact (1998).

On television, he received two Primetime Emmy Award nominations for the NBC film Miss Rose White and the HBO television film Stalin (1992), the later of which earned him the Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actor – Series, Miniseries or Television Film. He also portrayed Otto Frank in the TV film The Diary of Anne Frank (1980), the Russian emperor Peter the Great in the NBC series Peter the Great (1986), Frederick the Great in the British series Young Catherine (1991), and Brother Jean le Maistre in the miniseries Joan of Arc (1999).

Schell also performed in a number of stage plays, including a celebrated performance as Prince Hamlet. Schell was an accomplished pianist and conductor, performing with Claudio Abbado and Leonard Bernstein, and with orchestras in Berlin and Vienna. His elder sister was the internationally noted actress Maria Schell; he produced the documentary tribute My Sister Maria in 2002.

Mathieu Demy is a French filmmaker and actor. He is the son of renowned filmmakers Jacques Demy and Agnès Varda. Demy has directed several acclaimed films, including "Americano" (2011), "Lola Pater" (2017), and "Three Songs for Benazir" (2021).

Demy began his career as an actor, appearing in several films directed by his parents. He made his directorial debut in 2000 with the short film "The Girl from the Train." His first feature film, "Americano," was a critically acclaimed drama about a young French woman who travels to Los Angeles to find her estranged father.

Demy's films are often characterized by their personal and intimate style. He frequently explores themes of family, relationships, and loss. His films have been praised for their emotional honesty and visual beauty.

In addition to his work as a director, Demy has also written several screenplays and acted in several films. He is a regular collaborator with his wife, the actress Chiara Mastroianni.

Demy is a rising star in French cinema. His films have been shown at major film festivals around the world, and he has won several awards for his work. He is a talented filmmaker with a unique vision, and he is sure to continue to make acclaimed films for many years to come.

Yerkebulan Muratovich  Daiyrov was born on August 12, 1986, in Karasaz village, Raimbek District, Almaty Region, Kazakhstan. In 2008, he graduated from the Faculty of Musical Theater and Variety Arts at the T. K. Zhurgenov Kazakh National Academy of Arts.

Since 2006, he has been an actor at the Mukhtar Auezov Kazakh State Academic Drama Theater. Over the years, he has received several prestigious awards, including the "Serper" Youth Union Prize in 2013, the Baurzhan Momyshuly "Namys" Order in 2015, and the title of Honored Artist of Kazakhstan in 2018.

In 2021, he gained international recognition by winning the "Best Asian Actor" award at the Cannes Film Festival for his role in the movie Sunflower, directed by Eli Gilman.

On July 25, 2014, he married actress Leila Muratovna Tleuova. The couple has two daughters, Kausar (born March 23, 2015) and Salima (born May 5, 2019), as well as a son, Bauyrzhan (born November 16, 2022).

Yerkebulan Daiyrov is known for his roles in films such as Kash (2022), The Way of the Leader: Astana (2018), and Amre (2018).
data.name: Yerkebulan Daiyrov

data.biography:
Еркебулан Муратович Дайыров родился 12 августа 1986 года в селе Карасаз Райымбекского района Алматинской области. В 2008 году окончил факультет музыкального театра и эстрады Казахской национальной академии искусств имени Т. К. Жургенова.  С 2006 года является актёром Казахского государственного академического театра драмы имени М. О. Ауэзова.

В 2013 году Дайыров был удостоен премии Союза молодёжи Казахстана «Серпер». В 2015 году получил орден «Намыс» имени Бауыржана Момышулы. В 2018 году ему присвоено звание Заслуженного деятеля Казахстана.  В 2021 году Еркебулан Дайыров был признан «Лучшим азиатским актёром» на Каннском кинофестивале за роль в фильме «Подсолнух» режиссёра Эли Гильман.  С 25 июля 2014 года женат на актрисе Лейле Муратовне Тлеуовой. У пары две дочери: Каусар (род. 23 марта 2015) и Салима (род. 5 мая 2019), а также сын Бауыржан (род. 16 ноября 2022).  Еркебулан Дайыров известен своими ролями в таких фильмах, как «Каш» (2022), «Путь Лидера. Астана» (2018) и «Амре» (2018).
data.name: Еркебулан Дайыров
